economic_notes: Dakota Plains Wahpeton Oyate Economics Development Corporation excluded from consolidation and accounted for at cost. First Nation is contingently liable as co-borrower on a Bridging Finance Inc. demand loan with principal of $5,555,000; balance was $6,746,375 at March 31, 2021, subsequently in payment default with $10,207,930 owing as of August 21, 2023.
notes: Disclaimer of Opinion issued by Baker Tilly HMA LLP due to significant internal control weaknesses affecting cash, accounts receivable, investments, tangible capital assets, accounts payable, contingencies, payroll, revenue, deferred revenue, and expenditures. Audit report signed February 1, 2024 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 — a nearly 3-year delay. Dakota Plains Wahpeton Oyate Economics Development Corporation excluded from consolidation (accounted for at cost $100). Nation is contingently liable as co-borrower on a Bridging Finance Inc. loan; balance of $6,746,375 at year-end subsequently defaulted with $10,207,930 owing as of August 2023. No remuneration schedule included. Prior year total revenue in segment disclosure ($3,299,791) differs slightly from statement of operations ($3,284,291) due to segment presentation differences. OSR is negative because eliminations and deferred revenue adjustments exceed other own-source revenues.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
